headline: Centene (CNC) Valuation Check As Community Investments And Revenue Growth Meet Profitability Strains
summary: Recent community-focused investments at Centene (CNC), including housing grants in California and social determinant grants in Texas, have put fresh attention on how its social spending lines up with revenue growth and ongoing profitability pressures. See our latest analysis for Centene. Centene's recent grant activity comes as the stock trades at US$43.82, with a 90 day share price return of 12.91% but a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 24.28%, suggesting short term momentum has...
